backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no logic, serving as a placeholder entry point for the ICP canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features (multi-section landing page and visual theme) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing their roles in the landing site.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full single-page layout by rendering Navigation, HeroSection, AboutSection, FeaturesSection, and ContactFooter in sequence.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Two-column about section with an animated orbital logo graphic and stat cards on the left, and descriptive copy with checkmark highlights on the right.
frontend/src/components/ContactFooter.ts: Combined contact and footer component featuring a contact info panel, a controlled form with submission feedback, social links, and site navigation links.
Six-card responsive grid showcasing key product features with amber icon badges, hover glow effects, and a bottom CTA linking to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-viewport hero section with a background image, gradient overlay, animated headline and subheading, dual CTA buttons, stat counters, and a scroll-down indicator.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with scroll-aware active section highlighting, smooth scroll on link click, and a responsive mobile menu toggle using Lucide icons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a dark charcoal + warm amber OKLCH CSS variable palette, Tailwind base/utilities imports, and custom utility classes for glows, gradients, and nav blur effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based color tokens (amber, charcoal, semantic colors), custom shadows, border radii, fonts, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing two implemented features: a multi-section landing page with sticky navigation and a dark charcoal/amber visual theme, with no pending new feature requests.
